SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.model

Class UserComment

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.model.UserComment
public class UserComment extends Object
Represents a comment made by a user on an event.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UserComment()
    Empty constructor required for Firebase deserialization.
    UserComment(String text, String userID, String userName)
    Creates a user comment with text, user ID, and user name.
    UserComment(String text, String userID, String userName, boolean isOrganizer)
    Creates a user comment and records whether the commenter is an organizer.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserComment

      public UserComment()
      Empty constructor required for Firebase deserialization.

    • UserComment

      public UserComment(String text, String userID, String userName)
      Creates a user comment with text, user ID, and user name.
      Parameters:
      text - the comment text
      userID - the ID of the user who made the comment
      userName - the name of the user who made the comment

    • UserComment

      public UserComment(String text, String userID, String userName, boolean isOrganizer)
      Creates a user comment and records whether the commenter is an organizer.
      Parameters:
      text - the comment text
      userID - the ID of the user who made the comment
      userName - the name of the user who made the comment
      isOrganizer - whether the commenter is an organizer
